entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bi-color (L.) Moench landrace collection maintained by ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger landrace collection

entities.name: RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling procedure used after stratification to establish a subset

entities.name: STRATIFICATION
entities.description: A process of dividing the collection into subgroups before random sampling

entities.name: SELECTIVE SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling procedure based on quantitative characters

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE CHARACTERS
entities.description: Measurable phenotypic traits used for selective sampling

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL ORIGIN
entities.description: The location of origin of landraces used as a selection criterion

entities.name: FARMERS' SELECTION
entities.description: Traits selected by farmers used as a selection criterion

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the sorghum subsets

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE LOCI
entities.description: 15 loci used to assess genetic diversity through polymorphisms

entities.name: MULTIPLEX POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTIONS
entities.description: PCRs used to genotype landraces using fluorescent primer-pairs

entities.name: FLUORESCENT PRIMER-PAIRS
entities.description: Primer-pairs used in multiplex PCRs for allele sizing

entities.name: SEMI-AUTOMATED ALLELE SIZING
entities.description: A method used to determine the size of alleles from PCR products

entities.name: ALLELIC RICHNESS
entities.description: The average number of alleles per locus, used as a measure of genetic diversity

entities.name: ALLELIC FREQUENCY DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The distribution of alleles within each subset compared using statistical tests

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used to compare allelic frequency distributions

entities.name: RARE ALLELES
entities.description: Alleles with low frequency maintained in the subsets

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CHARACTERS
entities.description: Observable characteristics used in sampling procedures
